mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, location_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_location WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, location_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_location WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, location_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_location WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, location_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_location WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND location_code = #{locationCode} AND deleted = 0
